purpose_context: The dead-code scanners' 342-entry allow-list keys on module::Name, so relocating a sanctioned symbol forces a manual edit. A prior spike proved a relocation-tolerant key is feasible for the ~278 simple entries (the ~60 re-export/facade/fan-out entries stay collision-safe but relocation-forfeit by necessity). This mission delivers that key + symbol-granular category auto-derivation while preserving every dead-code invariant (T004 no-false-negative, known_modules, the bidirectional ratchet).
purpose_tldr: Re-key the architectural dead-code allow-lists onto a relocation-tolerant symbol identity (WS2 carved from #2546) so a behaviour-preserving symbol relocation no longer forces a hand-edit, while preserving the gate's full bite.
